title: `Ebed #5651
definition:
Ebed = "servant"

 1) father of Gaal in the time of the judges
 2) son of Jonathan and one of the sons of Adin who returned from
    exile with Ezra
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ebed = "servant"

 1) father of Gaal in the time of the judges
 2) son of Jonathan and one of the sons of Adin who returned from
    exile with Ezra

    NASB:  servant, two Isr.
